description: A guest calls to ask what time the doors open for a concert tonight and what the venue's bag policy is.

nodes.task_description: Look up the event details for tonight's concert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the event information in the system.

nodes.task_description: Inform the guest that doors open at 7:00 PM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the correct door time.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the standard venue bag policy from the knowledge base.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the policy stating only small clear bags are allowed.

nodes.task_description: Clearly explain the bag policy to the guest.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately communicates the bag size and type restrictions.
